introSection: Tyfonen (Danish for Typhoon) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Tivoli Friheden in Århus, Jylland, Denmark.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The addition of Tyfonen was announced in December 2005.

fullText:
Tyfonen (Danish for Typhoon) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Tivoli Friheden in Århus, Jylland, Denmark.

The addition of Tyfonen was announced in December 2005.



Blue track with green supports.
